task: I need to leave a short note for a neighbor after missing her call, and I want it to be polite and easy to understand. Could you help me draft something brief that says I’ll get back to her?

turns.agent_response:
Of course — here’s a short, polite note you can leave:

“Hi [Name], sorry I missed your call. I’ll get back to you as soon as I can. Thanks.”

If you want, I can also make it a little warmer, more formal, or more specific.

user_simulator.text: That works fine. Short and clear, just what I needed.
